name: Pumpkin-Mincemeat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease three 9 x 5 inch loaf pans or five 7-1/2 x 4 inch loaf pans, set aside.
2. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
3. In a large bowl, stir together flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, pumpkin pie spice, granulated sugar and brown sugar; set aside.
4. In a medium bowl, beat eggs. Stir in sourdough starter, water, oil and pumpkin.
5. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients. Stir until dry ingredients are just moistened.
6. Stir in mincemeat and nuts.
7. Pour the batter evenly into prepared pans.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Turn out of pans.
10. Cool top side up on a rack.
11. Wrap each cooled loaf in plastic wrap or foil as a gift or to freeze. Thaw wrapped frozen loaves at room temperature for 2 hours.
12. Makes 3 large loaves or 5 medium loaves.
